message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Melihat Surat BKD

actor "AdministratorBKD" as Admin
participant "Dashboard_V" as DashboardV
participant "SuratBKD_V" as SuratBKDV
participant "Admin_C" as AdminC
participant "BKD_C" as BKDC
database "SuratDisposisi_E" as SuratDisposisiE

AdminC -> DashboardV: 1 load->view()
DashboardV --> Admin: 2 Halaman Dashboard
Admin -[hidden]-> DashboardV: 3 klik menu Surat BKD
DashboardV -> BKDC: 4 index()
BKDC -> SuratDisposisiE: 5
SuratDisposisiE --> BKDC: 6
BKDC -> SuratBKDV: 7 load->view()
SuratBKDV --> Admin: 8 Halaman Surat BKD

@enduml
```
